case_title: KAMEL SEBBAK VS. THE HARTFORD FINANCIAL SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-17-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. PER COMMISIONER PANG LY, IN AN EFFORT TO MINIMIZE ANY UNNECCESSRY EXPOSURE TO COVID-19, PLAINTIFF IS CALLED BY CLERK ON 9-3-20 TO SEE IF THERE IS A PROOF OF SERVICE FILED OR IF HE WOULD LIKE TO CONTINUE THIS TO ALLOW TIME TO SERVE. PLAINTIFF STATES TAHT A CONTUINUANCE IS NEEDED. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,939.44 FILED BY SEBBAK, KAMEL AS TO DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD FINANCIAL SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 17, 2020 AT 3:30 P.M. D. 506.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED SEP-28-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD FINANCIAL SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-05-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KAMEL SEBBAK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD FINANCIAL SERVICES IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MUST AMEND CLAIM TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANT AND AGENT OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO AMEND CLAIM AND PROOF OF SERVICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEBBAK, KAMEL AS TO DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD FINANCIAL SERVICES
